notes.en: [[character:xiao]] is a Hypercarry that is centered around plunge attacks. Due to his expensive [[ability:burst]], [[character:xiao]] usually requires a high amount of [[stat:er]] and/or at least one [[element:anemo]] battery ([[character:sucrose]], [C6] [[character:faruzan]], [[character:xianyun]]) on his team to help him recharge his [[ability:burst]].
notes.fr: [[character:xiao]] est un Hypercarry centré autour des attaques plongeantes. En raison de son [[ability:burst]] coûteux, [[character:xiao]] a généralement besoin d'une grande quantité de [[stat:er]] et/ou d'au moins une batterie [[element:anemo]] ([[character:sucrose]], [[character:faruzan]] [C6], [[character:xianyun]]) dans son équipe pour l'aider à recharger son [[ability:burst]].
notes.it: [[character:xiao]] è un 'hypercarry' incentrato sugli Attacchi in picchiata. A causa dell'alto costo di Energia del suo [[ability:burst]], [[character:xiao]] necessita solitamente di un'elevata quantità di [[stat:er]] e/o almeno una batteria [[element:anemo]] ([[character:sucrose]], [[character:faruzan]] [C6], [[character:xianyun]]) all'interno del team.
notes.ru: Гиперкерри, играющий от атак в падении. Из-за стоимости [[ability:burst|Взрыва стихии]] Сяо требуется большое количество [[stat:er|ВЭ]] и / или как минимум одна [[element:anemo]] батарейка ([[character:sucrose]], [C6] [[character:faruzan]], [[character:xianyun]]).

notes.en: **[[character:xiao]]'s Optimal [[ability:skill]] Rotation:** {rot: E E Q Plunge Combo}
notes.fr: **Rotation optimale du [[ability:skill]] de [[character:xiao]] : {rot: E E A PCombo}**
notes.ru: **Оптимальное комбо [[ability:skill|навыков]]:** {rot: E E Q Комбо атак в падении}

notes.en: - **Best combo for [[character:xiao]] when fighting a single target:**
notes.fr: - **Meilleur combo pour [[character:xiao]] contre une cible unique :**

notes.en:
- {rot:NA CA hP} (no collision possible)
 - {rot:NA > CA lP} (collision only possible on Low Plunge)
 - {rot:hP spam} (collision possible on High Plunge)
notes.fr:
- {rot:N C HP} (aucune collision possible)
 - {rot:N C LP} (collision seulement possible sur la Plunge basse)
 - {rot:HP spam} (collision possible sur la Plunge haute)
notes.it:
- {rot:NA > CA > Attacco in picchiata alto} (collisione non possibile)
 - {rot:NA > CA > Attacco in picchiata basso} (collisione possibile solo su Picchiata bassa)
 - Attacchi in picchiata alti a ripetizione (collisione possibile su Picchiata alta)
notes.ru:
- {rot:NA CA hP} (без коллизии)
 - {rot:NA > CA lP} (коллизия возможна с низкими атаками)
 - {rot:hP spam} (коллизия возможна с высокими атаками)

notes.en: - **Best combo for [[character:xiao]] when fighting multiple enemies:**

notes.it: - Attacchi in picchiata alti a ripetizione
